subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Due to lack of time, a brief reply is herein penned regarding the purchase of the house [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از عدم فرصت جواب مختصر مرقوم میگردد خرید خانه
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
